title: Just Dodge Motion Vocabulary
purpose: Canonical action vocabulary and conservative current-corpus coverage inventory for MotionBricks conditioning, segmentation, acquisition, and QA planning.

source_scope.cmu: CMU subjects/trials surveyed in cmu_combat_mocap_survey_2026-07-17.md. Directly named technique coverage is distinguished from generic boxing/swordplay coverage.
source_scope.kungfu_athlete_bot: Current local KungfuAthleteBot segments in qa_runs/grab07_combat_corpus/kungfu_segments/manifest.json: 97 strike, 497 kick, 192 grab, and 5 footwork segments. These are single-actor Wushu/reconstructed segments and must not be represented as paired grappling data.

availability_meaning.yes: A current source explicitly covers the named family or is directly labeled for it.
availability_meaning.partial: A related/generic current source exists but requires semantic segmentation, contact validation, or technique audit before admission.
availability_meaning.no: No verified current-corpus source covers the required action.

source_scope.runtime_policy: Manifest entries are vocabulary/planning records, not runtime permission. Every admitted primitive still needs provenance, retargeting, MotionBricks conditioning, and visual/physics QA.
